privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introduction: We are committed to protecting your privacy.

sections.dataCollectionDesc: We collect information to provide and improve our services, including personal information, health data, and usage patterns.
sections.dataUsageDesc: Your data is used to provide healthcare services, improve our platform, and comply with legal obligations.
sections.dataSecurityDesc: We employ industry-standard encryption and security measures to protect your information.
sections.thirdPartyDesc: We do not share your data with third parties without your explicit consent, except as required by law.
sections.userRightsDesc: You have the right to access, modify, or delete your personal data at any time.
sections.contactDesc: For privacy concerns, contact us at support@roshetta.com
